channel.title: BUscience
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUscience, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Yellowstone wolves may not have transformed the national park after all
item.description: A new scientific review challenges the headline-grabbing claim that Yellowstone’s returning wolves triggered one of the strongest trophic cascades on ...

item.title: NASA scientists say meteorites can’t explain mysterious organic compounds on Mars
item.description: Scientists studying a rock sample collected by NASA’s Curiosity rover have uncovered something tantalizing: the largest organic molecules ever detecte...

item.title: Scientists discover protein that rejuvenates aging brain cells
item.description: A newly identified protein may hold the key to rejuvenating aging brain cells. Researchers found that boosting DMTF1 can restore the ability of neural...

item.title: Europe’s “untouched” wilderness was shaped by Neanderthals and hunter-gatherers
item.description: Long before agriculture, humans were transforming Europe’s wild landscapes. Advanced simulations show that hunting and fire use by Neanderthals and Me...

item.title: NSF announces first AI-ENGAGE awards to modernize global agriculture
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation, in coordination with partner agencies from Australia, India and Japan, today announced the first cohort of award...

item.title: Update on restructure of critical weather science infrastructure
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation has informed the NSF National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR) that management and operations of the NCAR-W...

item.title: Astronomers discover an Earth-like planet that may be colder than Mars
item.description: A newly identified planet candidate, HD 137010 b, looks strikingly Earth-like in size and orbit — but it may be colder than Mars due to its dimmer sta...

item.title: Intent to restructure critical weather science infrastructure
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF) announced today that the agency is reviewing the structure of the research and observational capabilities o...

item.title: NSF and partners invest $9M in AI-focused math education program
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation Directorate for Social, Behavioral, and Economic Sciences (NSF SBE) has launched the Collaboratory to Advance Mat...

item.title: NSF announces new initiative to launch and scale a new generation of transformative independent research organizations to advance breakthrough science
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation Directorate for Technology, Innovation and Partnerships (NSF TIP) on Friday announced the launch of a new initiat...
